input.settingPrompt: A flame-wreathed dwarven deep-forge abandoned to magma and ash, where fire-cultists now hammer cursed iron in the dark beneath a dead mountain.

keyLocations.name: The Magma Cistern
keyLocations.description: a churning lake of molten rock that lights the lower halls

keyLocations.name: The Anvil Throne
keyLocations.description: the forge-lord's seat of welded blades, long gone cold

keyLocations.name: The Collapsed Stair
keyLocations.description: the rubble-choked ascent toward the surface

identity.locationType: active forge-hall where fire-cultists hammer cursed iron
identity.characteristics: A broad, soot-blackened chamber of dwarven masonry built close above the magma cistern, its great hearth still roaring; anvils, quench-troughs, and racks of half-forged cursed blades crowd the working floor while heat-shimmer warps the air.
identity.tone: infernal, oppressive, hot and industrious, reverent toward fire in a cruel cultic way

floor.texture: heavy dwarven slabs scorched black, scattered with grey ash, glittering iron filings, and slag-spatter, cracked here and there to show a faint orange glow seeping from beneath

ceiling.texture: soot-caked stone webbed with old smoke-stains, hung with iron chains and crusted slag stalactites, faintly lit from below by furnace-glow

back.texture: a wall dominated by the deep recess of the great hearth, brickwork glazed and cracked by centuries of heat, mortar fused to glass at the edges of the firebox

front.texture: soot-darkened stone bearing the worn relief of a hammer-and-flame sigil, broken by the entry: a tall iron-banded gate of blackened metal standing open, its hinges weeping rust, the threshold worn smooth by dragged ore-carts

left.texture: heat-scorched stone, ringed with iron tool-hooks and brackets, streaked with soot above where braziers once burned

right.texture: matching scorched stone, the lower courses scrawled with the fire-cult's ember-red glyphs daubed in ochre and ash

objects.name: Great Hearth-Forge
objects.description: A massive arched forge built into the back wall, its firebox choked with glowing coals and warped cursed slag, breathing a constant furnace-roar of heat and ember-light.

objects.name: Hammer-and-Flame Banner
objects.description: A scorched iron-and-leather banner bearing the fire-cult's hammer wreathed in painted flame, hung high above the forge mouth.

objects.name: Master Anvil
objects.description: A colossal blackened anvil set on a basalt block, its face mirror-bright from work and stained at one edge with a sickly cursed sheen.

objects.name: Forge-Hammer
objects.description: An oversized two-handed forge-hammer, its haft wrapped in sweat-blackened leather, resting head-down across the anvil's face.

objects.name: Quench-Trough
objects.description: A long iron-bound stone trough of stagnant black water filmed with oil and ash, steam still curling from its surface.

objects.name: Bellows-Engine
objects.description: A great accordion bellows of cracked hide and iron ribbing, geared to a hand-crank, that feeds the hearth's fire.

objects.name: Cursed-Blade Rack
objects.description: A standing iron rack hung with half-finished cursed blades and glaives, their edges still dull and weeping a faint dark vapor.

objects.name: Coal-and-Ore Bins
objects.description: A row of riveted iron bins heaped with black coal and raw, faintly veined ore, dust spilling over their lips.

objects.name: Standing Brazier (left)
objects.description: A tall iron brazier on three clawed feet, its bowl full of low red coals, casting flickering light across the working floor.

objects.name: Standing Brazier (right)
objects.description: A twin clawed-foot brazier of glowing coals, mirroring its partner so the central aisle is lit from both sides.

objects.name: Slag-Ash Hide
objects.description: A heavy, half-burnt hide laid as a work-mat, crusted with cinders and iron-scale where the smith stands at the anvil.

objects.name: Cooling-Chain Hoist
objects.description: A heavy iron hoist-chain on a ceiling pulley, hung with cooling tongs and a hooked lifting clamp, swaying faintly in the rising heat.

arrangementProse: Stepping through the open iron gate in the front wall, the viewer looks straight down a clear working aisle to the roaring Great Hearth-Forge (obj_01) built into the center of the back wall. Mounted high on the back wall above the forge mouth hangs the scorched Hammer-and-Flame Banner (obj_02), and tucked against the back wall to the right of the hearth stands the great Bellows-Engine (obj_06) that feeds its fire. Set just forward of the hearth, off-center toward the left so the sightline to the firebox stays open, stands the Master Anvil (obj_03) on its basalt block, with the heavy Forge-Hammer (obj_04) resting across its face; the half-burnt Slag-Ash Hide (obj_11) lies on the floor centered beneath the anvil where the smith works. Hard against the left wall beyond the anvil runs the long Quench-Trough (obj_05). Along the right wall stand the Cursed-Blade Rack (obj_07) and, beside it, the row of Coal-and-Ore Bins (obj_08). Flanking the mouth of the aisle nearer the entry are two clawed-foot braziers, the left Standing Brazier (obj_09) against the left wall and the right Standing Brazier (obj_10) against the right wall, lighting the way in. Overhead, between the entry and the anvil, the Cooling-Chain Hoist (obj_12) hangs from the ceiling on its pulley. The floor just inside the gate and the central line of sight to the hearth are kept clear; anvil, trough, rack, bins, and braziers are all set against or close to the side and back walls.

placementNotes.note: Built into the center of the back wall; the glowing focal point at the end of the entry aisle.
Mounted high on the back wall above the forge mouth.
Stands just forward of the hearth, set off-center toward the left so the firebox stays visible.
Rests across the face of the master anvil.
Runs along the left wall beyond the anvil.
Against the back wall to the right of the hearth, feeding its fire.
Lined up against the right wall beside the cursed-blade rack.
Against the left wall near the entry, flanking the aisle mouth.
Against the right wall near the entry, mirroring the left brazier.
Lies on the floor centered beneath the master anvil.
Hangs from the ceiling on its pulley between the entry and the anvil.
